mood: Utilitarian trust meets clean modernism — a self-storage experience where pricing is transparent, booking is instant, every unit is accounted for, and every facility feels secure, well-lit, and professionally maintained
designRules: IDENTITY: Manrope headings at confident scale (4xl-6xl) with tight tracking and heavy weight (700-800) — numerals feel engineered, not decorative. A 4px steel-blue rule (#1B3A57) under section eyebrows signals structure; safety-amber (#E8922C) reserved for pricing callouts and primary CTAs. No pure white — warm neutral #F7F8FA ground feels like polished concrete

COLOR HIERARCHY: Deep steel-blue primary (#1B3A57) carries authority and security; slate secondary (#4A5C6A) for supporting surfaces and nav. Safety-amber accent (#E8922C) is rationed — used only on Reserve/Book CTAs, price tags (accent background with ink text), and availability badges so it retains urgency. Steel-light (#C7CED6) borders replace grey; primaryDark (#0F2438) for the footer and deep dark sections. Tabular numerals everywhere pricing appears

LAYOUT: Hero with facility search (size + location) as primary conversion tool above a facility photo. Unit-size grid as 4-column card matrix with price/sqft/features in monospace columns. Facility locator with interactive map + list. Amenities as icon-grid (6-8 items: climate, 24/7 access, video surveillance, drive-up, gated, month-to-month). FAQ accordion. Sticky availability bar on unit pages

COMPONENTS: Cards use rounded-lg (8px) with crisp 1px steel-light borders and shadow-sm (no heavy blur) — hover lifts border to primary, not translate. Buttons are rectangular-feeling (rounded-md, px-7 py-3.5, 2px border on secondary). Price tags in monospace on an accent background with ink text (bg-accent text-ink). Availability badges: green/amber/red dot + tabular label. Dividers are straight 1px steel-light rules, never gradients

DATA DISPLAY: Unit-size tables use monospace for dimensions (10x10, 5x5) and prices ($89/mo); tabular-nums for counts. Specs shown as label/value pairs with uppercase tracking-wider labels. Availability uses colored dot + word ('Available' / '2 left' / 'Waitlist'). Map pins styled as primary square markers with accent stroke on hover

CONVERSION: Sticky top nav with amber 'Reserve Unit' CTA always visible. Size calculator/guide prominently linked. Phone number and facility hours in header and footer. Month-to-month / No deposit / First month free trust bar above fold. Clear price-per-month prefix on every unit card. Reserve flow is 2-step max — no forced account creation

designPatterns.card: <div className="bg-background rounded-lg p-6 border border-steel-light shadow-sm hover:border-primary hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200">
designPatterns.button: <a className="inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-accent text-ink font-bold px-7 py-3.5 rounded-md text-base shadow-sm hover:bg-accent-dark hover:shadow-md transition-all">
designPatterns.buttonSecondary: <a className="inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-background text-primary font-semibold px-7 py-3.5 rounded-md text-base border-2 border-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-background transition-all">
designPatterns.heading: <h2 className="font-heading text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-extrabold text-text tracking-tight" style="text-wrap: balance">
designPatterns.badge: <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-accent-light border border-accent/30 rounded-md px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold text-primary-dark uppercase tracking-wider font-mono">
designPatterns.input: <input className="w-full bg-background border border-steel-light rounded-md px-4 py-3 text-text placeholder:text-muted focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/25 focus:border-primary transition font-body" />
designPatterns.navStyle: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-background/95 backdrop-blur-md border-b-2 border-steel-light shadow-sm
designPatterns.navButton: <a className="inline-flex items-center bg-accent text-ink font-bold px-5 py-2.5 rounded-md text-sm hover:bg-accent-dark transition-all">
designPatterns.iconBox: <div className="h-12 w-12 rounded-md bg-primary/8 border border-primary/15 flex items-center justify-center text-primary">
designPatterns.pricingFeatured: Best Value
